response.justification: Wei is a highly skilled Staff Software Engineer with solid distributed systems experience, but lacks the executive leadership, team scaling history, and deep AI/Fintech architectural background required for a CTO role.
strengths: Over 10 years of hands-on software engineering and diverse full-stack experience.
Strong background in high-throughput distributed systems and microservices.
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling.
concerns: Zero executive leadership experience or track record of scaling engineering teams.
Lacks production experience architecting complex, stateful multi-agent AI systems.
No direct experience with algorithmic working-capital or credit risk fintech systems.
